sql.query: SELECT l.id,l.locationName,l.locationType,l.addressLine1,l.townCity,l.postcode,l.country,l.isActive,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS spaceCount,CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) AS UNSIGNED) AS configurationCount FROM tbl_locations l LEFT JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.locationId=l.id AND s.tenantId=l.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_space_configurations c ON c.spaceId=s.id AND c.tenantId=l.tenantId WHERE l.tenantId=:tenantId GROUP BY l.id ORDER BY l.isActive DESC,l.sortOrder,l.locationName
